titles.en: Techapter 59 - Chapter on Umm Al-Walad Killing Her Master by Mistake or Intentionar
Techapter 59 - Chapter on Umm Al-Walad Killing Her Master by Mistake or Intentionar

segments: : "إِذَا قَتَلَتْ أُمُّ اَلْوَلَدِ سَيِّدَهَا خَطَأً فَهِيَ حُرَّةٌ وَ لاَ تَبِعَةَ عَلَيْهَا وَ إِنْ قَتَلَتْهُ عَمْداً قُتِلَتْ بِهِ".
arabic.text: : "إِذَا قَتَلَتْ أُمُّ اَلْوَلَدِ سَيِّدَهَا خَطَأً فَهِيَ حُرَّةٌ وَ لاَ تَبِعَةَ عَلَيْهَا وَ إِنْ قَتَلَتْهُ عَمْداً قُتِلَتْ بِهِ".

segments:
Hadith.5367 - Wahb ibn Wahb narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) that Imam (as) used to say:
"If a slave woman who has borne a child (umm Al-walad) kills her master by mistake, she becomes free and there is no liability upon her. However, if she intentionally kills him, she is to be executed for him."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5367 - Wahb ibn Wahb narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) that Imam (as) used to say:
"If a slave woman who has borne a child (umm Al-walad) kills her master by mistake, she becomes free and there is no liability upon her. However, if she intentionally kills him, she is to be executed for him."

narratorChain.raw: 5367 - رَوَى وَهْبُ بْنُ وَهْبٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَقُولُ
